meaning: adj.凯撒的,帝国的,专制的n.古罗马皇帝的拥护者,专制统治的拥护者
examples: She had to have a Caesarean.
The baby was delivered by Caesarean section.
Her labour had lasted ten hours before the doctor arranged a Caesarean section.
"The key is not to say 'no' to a request for a Caesarean section, " he says.
Doctors at Bellevue Hospital Center in Manhattan delivered the boy by postmortem caesarean section.
